fields.name: title
fields.label: Meta Title
fields.description: Overrides the page title for search results

fields.name: heading
fields.label: Section title
fields.description: Optional. If empty the title will not display.

fields.name: intro
fields.label: Intro text
fields.description: Optional short paragraph under the title.

fields.name: cardTitleAlignment
fields.label: Card title alignment
fields.description: Align card titles left or center.

fields.name: cardTextAlignment
fields.label: Card text alignment
fields.description: Align card body text left or center.

fields.name: cardButtonAlignment
fields.label: Card button alignment
fields.description: Align the card button inside each card.

fields.name: cardImageSize
fields.label: Image size
fields.description: Size used for card images; 'full' will fill the card top area.

fields.name: hoverEffect
fields.label: Hover animation
fields.description: Add a small hover lift effect on cards (optional).

fields.name: cards
fields.label: Cards
fields.description: Add card items. Click 'Add' to create a card.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Card image
fields.description: Upload an image to display above the card text.

fields.name: buttonText
fields.label: Button text
fields.description: Optional text for the CTA button.

fields.name: buttonLink
fields.label: Button link
fields.description: Optional: URL that the button should link to.

fields.name: siteOwner
fields.label: Your Name, Company Name (Used in the footer

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
